response.justification: Candidate is dramatically overqualified for an entry-level Junior Java role — current title is Staff Software Engineer at Stripe with ~15 years of experience, including senior roles at Shopify and Dunnhumby. German proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' which fails the role's requirement for strong verbal and written German for client work in the insurance sector. Java appears only as a peripheral skill; primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. High flight risk, salary mismatch, and language gap make this a poor fit despite strong engineering credentials.
strengths: Deep software engineering experience across web, backend, and embedded systems
Demonstrated agile/TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practice
Some prior Java exposure at Altom Consulting and National Instruments
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying to entry-level role
German is only 'Basic'; role requires strong German for insurance-sector client work
Java is not a core skill; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang
